{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240938588814278E526BEAA2BA22"}"},"total":68},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7599872675667493657","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"经典套路，无功无过，不过比较好玩的是，不再是剧本编辑，主角全知全能的类型，虽然降低了一点逼格，但整体确实更好玩了，在番茄算是好书了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769486654,"group_id":"7596301143899130904","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"从此，世上再无摩拉克斯（谢邀，已转职，即将成为神农）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny3IqZfsX0fqlDtFUB7r4zTG5N7puZTA2mEys1KJVDE9","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f2e5551041244450ac49a5fea76139d2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776883290&x-signature=6U160yu1OGo4J9zshZokLYyG8a8%3D","user_id":"4182966883067191","user_name":"归终已离"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4182966883067191","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7596301143899130904","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出会涨，请高低进去尝个咸蛋！）
【幕后BOSS+迪化+无女主+自导自演+创造超凡+全球布局+马甲无数+全程无敌】
白孝，一个的社畜，意外获得能篡改现实、制造反派与英雄的黑色书册。
为在大恐怖降临前自救。
他决定亲手打碎这个唯物主义世界，将人类拖入超凡时代。
他撕下书页，让受虐的双胞胎姐妹化身的双子魔童，用童真与残忍在雾都掀起血案。
他赐予火焰，让热血消防员林烈觉醒异能，成为在黑暗中燃烧的孤独英雄。
正义与邪恶在街头厮杀。
英雄与怪物在废墟搏命。
全人类为未知的恐惧战栗！
而这一切，不过是白孝为收割混乱点精心导演的剧本。
他还有多重身份。
白天，他是超安局首席顾问，用科学理论指导官方对抗超凡。
深夜，他是蓝白社幕后社长，通过令人敬畏的管家‘零先生’操控英雄阵营。
暗处，他还通过使徒网络制造反派，扮演推动混乱的幕后黑手。
左手制造绝望，右手赐予希望。
各方势力在他的棋盘上厮杀，为他铺就通往‘神’的阶梯！
“别怕，这只是一场戏。”
“可惜……你们都是演员。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b15b54ab419b1f94c45526580bf01de7","author":"幕后黑手001","author_id":"","book_id":"7596301143899130904","book_name":"人在幕后，我的马甲皆是神明","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":846,"name":"黑化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=846&name=黑化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7596308667272528408","read_count":"14013","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"359156"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.0","serial_count":"166","tags":"都市高武,都市,都市异能,黑化,群像,迪化,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a2e99a12d2111a3e60bea52d906e5ef0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779500338&x-signature=dmRUtkCqjpntcCXQ%2F70U6zNMln4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4172012622190387","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"45"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240938588814278E526BEAA2BA22"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":23,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3835,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":10145},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602049573337400126","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常的不错嗯，没有过分的幕后文基本都会写出来的毒点。虽然有怀疑主角过分自信，但后面基本是坚信不移。也没有虚空女警察虚空勒索怀疑主角，这点就比较难得了。希望不要有那种太超出主角力量的角色，像什么反过来威胁主角之类的。反正就特别好看，虽然看书的时间不算特别长，但还是特别比较推荐的，反正字数还不多，可以空闲时看一看。作者大大加油更新，特别好看，期待新的章节。[送心][吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769995664,"group_id":"7596301143899130904","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新人，还望海涵，会努力创作","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/2q+Z55D1dPLJguOBtEM6Cg00pho2h9aABG/m9447u4","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bdd0d37091cd4190baece53936ad8652~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776883443&x-signature=3htigAMkWA6dFySenxFNxE6A6HY%3D","user_id":"1319830759412984","user_name":"风之伤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1319830759412984","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7596301143899130904","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出会涨，请高低进去尝个咸蛋！）
【幕后BOSS+迪化+无女主+自导自演+创造超凡+全球布局+马甲无数+全程无敌】
白孝，一个的社畜，意外获得能篡改现实、制造反派与英雄的黑色书册。
为在大恐怖降临前自救。
他决定亲手打碎这个唯物主义世界，将人类拖入超凡时代。
他撕下书页，让受虐的双胞胎姐妹化身的双子魔童，用童真与残忍在雾都掀起血案。
他赐予火焰，让热血消防员林烈觉醒异能，成为在黑暗中燃烧的孤独英雄。
正义与邪恶在街头厮杀。
英雄与怪物在废墟搏命。
全人类为未知的恐惧战栗！
而这一切，不过是白孝为收割混乱点精心导演的剧本。
他还有多重身份。
白天，他是超安局首席顾问，用科学理论指导官方对抗超凡。
深夜，他是蓝白社幕后社长，通过令人敬畏的管家‘零先生’操控英雄阵营。
暗处，他还通过使徒网络制造反派，扮演推动混乱的幕后黑手。
左手制造绝望，右手赐予希望。
各方势力在他的棋盘上厮杀，为他铺就通往‘神’的阶梯！
“别怕，这只是一场戏。”
